title: Non-record: 11L Int5 QAT + Score-First TTT — val_bpb 1.1356 (15.60 MiB)
author: JoeProAI
body:
## 11L U-Net + Int5 QAT + Score-First Legal TTT

**val_bpb: 1.13557402** | **15.60 MiB** (16,361,752 bytes) | 8xH100 (~33 min) | seed 314

Same architecture and config as PR #861 (seed 42, 1.13256182). Independent seed validation run.

### Architecture

| Param | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Layers | 11 |
| Model dim | 512 |
| Heads | 8 |
| MLP hidden | 1536 |
| Bigram buckets | 4096 |
| Bigram embed dim | 128 |
| Vocab size | 256 |
| Tie embeddings | false |

### Rule Compliance

- [x] Score-first TTT: tokens scored under `inference_mode()` before training on them
- [x] No val tokens used in artifact or training
- [x] No pre-eval adaptation
- [x] Artifact: 15.60 MiB (under 16 MiB limit)
- [x] Training time: ~1999s (under 600s eval budget)

Train script, submission.json, and run_training.sh included.
